What is the main summary of 'Application value of resting-state fMRI in preoperative lateralization of language areas in epilepsy with left-sided epileptogenic foci'?
ground_truth: Objective Focusing on patients with epilepsy and left-sided epileptogenic foci, this study aimed to clarify language lateralization differences from healthy individuals, explore Broca’s/Wernicke’s area lateralization and dominant hemisphere shift, and construct a laterality index–activation map combined scheme.
